name: Mission on Integrated Development of Horticulture- NHM and HMNEH
benefit_description: The scheme targets to provide following benefits: 1)	Increase in productivity of crops through diversification, from traditional crops to plantations, orchards, vineyards, flowers, vegetable gardens and bamboo plantations; and extension of appropriate technology to farmers. 2)	Promotion of R&D techn
details: MIDH covers horticulture items such as, fruits, vegetables, root & tuber crops, mushrooms, spices, flowers, aromatic plants, coconut, cashew, cocoa and bamboo. It is a Centrally-Sponsored Scheme covering all states and UTs. MIDH also provides technical advice and administrative support to State Governments/ State Horticulture Missions (SHMs) for the other horticulture related activities. Area of Operation & Funding pattern: ﻿ S. No. Sub-scheme Area of Operation Funding pattern 1 National Horticu
eligibility_text: All farmers / registered societies / state governments are eligible for the scheme
application_url: Step 01: Interested beneficiary can get in touch with District Horticulture Officer / Block Horticulture Officer to apply for the scheme.  Step 02: District Horticulture Officer / Block Horticulture O
